# Approval Atlas

## Snapshot

- Product: Northstar Desk
- Posture: Guarded
- Surfaces: 4
- Gated surfaces: 3
- Destructive surfaces: 1
- Unguarded high-risk surfaces: 0
- Highest risk surface: Cleanup Draft Files

## Why it exists

A small operator console for scouting ideas, drafting copy, and shipping tiny releases.

## Lane Map

### Discover

- **Search GitHub Repos** · No gate · permissions: network, read · risk 3

### Compose

- **Draft README Copy** · Human review · permissions: read · risk 2

### Ship

- **Publish Weekly Drop** · Approval required · permissions: write, network · risk 9

### Cleanup

- **Cleanup Draft Files** · Approval required · permissions: write, exec · risk 15

## Risk Hotspots

- **Cleanup Draft Files** — exec, write, destructive · Approval required · risk 15
- **Publish Weekly Drop** — write · Approval required · risk 9
- **Search GitHub Repos** — low-risk read path · No gate · risk 3

## Signal Board

- [mcp-use/inspector](https://github.com/mcp-use/inspector) — Modern MCP Inspector for remote MCP servers with Apps SDK support.
- [GitHub June 2026 roundup](https://github.com/resources/insights/enterprise-content-roundup-june-26) — Agentic delivery is becoming more governed and operational.
